headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -40.1)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 80% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 106 quotes, 80 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious grievances today.

• The frustration score of 51.9 sits in the middle of its typical range, showing consistent but not extreme venting.

• Optimism improved notably from yesterday's deeper negative but remains below average with many strong-intensity quotes still reflecting skepticism.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
